rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER GARCIA VS. DAVID O' KEEFFE AND KARI O'KEEFFE, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Alexander Garcia'S Motion To Compel Attendance Of David O'Keefe, Gerard O'Keefe, Kari O'Keefe And Farah Makras, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 17, 2017, line 4. Plaintiff Alexander Garcia'S Motion To Compel Attendance Of David O'Keefe, Gerard O'Keefe, Kari O'Keefe And Farah Makras, And For Monetary Sanctions DENIED without prejudice. Sanctions granted in the amount of $250 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S.BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. CARLOTA DEL PORTILLO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Stay Penidng Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 17, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT CARLOTA DEL PORTILLO, ELENA ASTURIAS' Motion For Stay Penidng Appeal GRANTED. No later than April 17, 2017 Plaintiff shall deposit with the Court $5,500. For the pendency of the stay, on the first of each month (or the first business day thereafter if the first of the month falls on a weekend or holiday) Defendant shall post $5,500. Shall the Defendant fail to make a timely posting, Plaintiff may apply ex-parte to lift the stay. Within 5 court days of resolution of appeal, Defendant shall notify the Court by filing a declaration and delivering a courtesy copy to department 501 on the same day. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ROSARIO CARRION-DI RICCO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 17, 2017, line 7. PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding validity and continued enforceability of 2006 Lease and Credit Advice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARLETT PEREZ VS. CARLOS FREDERICO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 17, 2017, line 8. DEFENDANT CARLOS FREDERICO's Motion To Quash Summons DENIED, Defendant to file a response within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Also, motion is untimely per CCP 1167.4; filed on April 3, 2017 and set for hearing April 17, 2017. = (501/REQ)
